did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper titled 'The impact of atopic dermatitis on caregivers of patients of all ages' (Chunk 5-7) is a survey-based study analyzing patient-reported outcomes using statistical methods (multivariate ordinal regression). It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning. While another abstract in the provided text (Chunk 1-2) discusses a boundary-aware convolutional neural network for skin lesion segmentation, that is a separate study and not the one identified by the filename.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
